creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
The failure for devel/gcc-arm-embedded does not seem to have anything to do with clang, as the last log lines are:

====>  Install samples into stage directory
tar: could not chdir to '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/gcc-arm-embedded/work/install/gcc-arm-embedded-4_8-2014q3-20140805/share/gcc-arm-none-eabi'

*** Error code 1

Looks like some sort of packaging error, instead.
